name: MailFlow
compose:
name: slashnode-mailflow
services:
  frontend:
    image: ghcr.io/maathimself/mailflow-frontend:1.7.2
    container_name: mailflow-frontend
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    depends_on:
      backend:
        condition: service_started
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:3395:80
  backend:
    image: ghcr.io/maathimself/mailflow-backend:1.7.2
    container_name: mailflow-backend
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    depends_on:
      postgres:
        condition: service_started
      redis:
        condition: service_started
    environment:
      NODE_ENV: production
      PORT: '3000'
      APP_URL: http://${node.exports.host}:3395
      FRONTEND_URL: http://${node.exports.host}:3395
      SESSION_SECRET: ${secret.APP_SEED}
      ENCRYPTION_KEY: ${secret.APP_SEED}
      DB_HOST: mailflow-postgres
      DB_NAME: mailflow
      DB_USER: mailflow
      DB_PASSWORD: mailflow
      REDIS_URL: redis://mailflow-redis:6379
      GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID: ''
      GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET: ''
      VAPID_PUBLIC_KEY: ''
      VAPID_PRIVATE_KEY: ''
      VAPID_SUBJECT: ''
  postgres:
    image: postgres:16-alpine
    container_name: mailflow-postgres
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      POSTGRES_DB: mailflow
      POSTGRES_USER: mailflow
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: mailflow
    volumes:
      - postgres_data-postgres:/var/lib/postgresql/data
  redis:
    image: redis:7-alpine
    container_name: mailflow-redis
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    command: redis-server --save 60 1 --loglevel warning
    volumes:
      - redis_data-redis:/data
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  postgres_data-postgres:
    name: slashnode-mailflow_postgres_data-postgres
  redis_data-redis:
    name: slashnode-mailflow_redis_data-redis
